name: Mark of Passage
description: Your speed increases by 5 feet. You can add 1d4 to Strength (Athletics) and Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks. You learn the Misty Step spell, can cast it once per long rest without a spell slot, and can cast it using any spell slots you have. Additionally, if you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic feature, several mobility-themed spells are added to your spell list.
